mapper.insert: insert into admin_operation_log(actor_id, module, action, method, path, status_code, request_id, summary, create_time) values(#{actorId}, #{module}, #{action}, #{method}, #{path}, #{statusCode}, #{requestId}, #{summary}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select id, actor_id as actorId, module, action, method, path, status_code as statusCode, request_id as requestId, summary, create_time as createTime from admin_operation_log order by create_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}
